title: Grilled Char with Algerian Spices
description: A flavorful grilled char dish seasoned with Algerian spices and served with a side of yang vegetables.

ingredients.name: algerian spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern markets

ingredients.name: yang vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as zucchini, bell peppers, and onions

instructions: Season char fillets with Algerian spice mix and olive oil.
Grill char for 4-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, brush yang vegetables with olive oil and grill for 3-5 minutes, or until tender.
Serve char with grilled yang vegetables and a squeeze of lemon juice.
